content: Follow simple steps to continue working in this {{productName}}:

comment.text: This is a subtitle displayed on the Two-Factor Authentication (TFA) activation page. It introduces the steps required to continue using the product after TFA setup, with `{{productName}}` replaced by the brand name (e.g., "ONLYOFFICE DocSpace").

usage.context:
<div className="set-app-description">
 <Text isBold fontSize="18px" className="set-app-title">
 {t("TfaTitle")}
 </Text>
 <Text className="set-app-subtitle">
 {t("TfaSubTitle", { productName: getBrandName("ProductName") })}
 </Text>
 
 <div className="description">
 <div className="description-item">
 <div className="icon-container">
